reply_points: thank her for sharing ideas in yesterday's meeting
say the connection between art and healing spaces really resonated
mention interest in weaving patient and staff input into the concept
suggest a short follow-up chat next week to explore practical next steps
keep the tone warm, thoughtful, and professional

attributes.subject: Re: Healing spaces brainstorming
attributes.body: Thanks again for making space for the conversation yesterday. I kept thinking about how art could soften the clinical feel of waiting areas and maybe even support reflection for patients and staff. If helpful, I'm happy to share a few examples and keep brainstorming.

attributes.subject: Updated staffing spreadsheet
attributes.body: Attached is the revised staffing sheet for next month. Please review the Friday coverage gaps when you have a chance.

attributes.subject: Quarterly community mural update
attributes.body: Quick note that the community mural partners confirmed the install window for next month. I'll send a fuller update later this week.
